title: Monuments & Landmarks
description: Locate these iconic American monuments and landmarks on the map.

rounds.clue: Standing in New York Harbor, this copper statue was a gift from France and holds a torch aloft.
This iconic suspension bridge connects San Francisco to Marin County, painted in International Orange.
The world's tallest arch, this 630-foot stainless steel monument overlooks the Mississippi River.
Four presidents' faces are carved into this South Dakota granite mountain in the Black Hills.
This Washington DC monument is the world's tallest stone obelisk, dedicated to the nation's first president.
